title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Navistar - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Mahindra Navistar - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Mahindra Navistar! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Kanpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Mahindra Navistar:
Mahindra Navistar is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Navistar!
